item.name: Aegis of the Untouchable
entries: This adamantium shield seems to consist of a shield design used long ago. It is a full body tower shield, bearing on its front the depiction of a knight beheading a hydra.

While you are wielding this shield, you gain a +2 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. Additionally, as a reaction to failing a save for an effect that would cause you to become {@condition blinded}, {@condition charmed}, {@condition deafened}, {@condition frightened}, {@condition grappled}, {@condition incapacitated}, {@condition paralyzed}, {@condition petrified}, {@condition poisoned}, knocked {@condition prone}, {@condition restrained}, or {@condition stunned}, you may activate the power of this shield. You end the conditions on you and become immune to them for 1 minute.
Once you use this ability, you can not use this again until you finish a long rest.
